summary: Tested the new date-based stock entry model. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - entry_day label displays correctly, Re-submit button shown for approved entries.

issues: Older entries created before the data model change have entry_day: null - this is expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: entry_day field correctly populated for new entries (YYYY-MM-DD format)
Same-day resubmission correctly overwrites existing entry and increments iteration
Approval creates stamp_approvals record with approval_day field
Resubmission after approval on same day correctly clears the approval
my-entries endpoint returns deduplicated latest entry per stamp
Frontend correctly shows entry_day label in muted gray badge next to stamp name
Re-submit button correctly shown only for approved entries

test_credentials.manager_note: SMANAGER password unknown - used admin credentials for manager tests

seed_data_creation: TEST_FRONTEND_STAMP, TEST_STAMP_001, TEST_APPROVAL_STAMP, TEST_RESUBMIT_STAMP, TEST_MULTIDAY_STAMP, TEST_REJECT_STAMP - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Date-based stock entry model fully tested. Key behaviors verified: (1) entry_day field added to new entries, (2) same stamp + same day = overwrite with iteration++, (3) approval includes approval_day, (4) resubmission clears same-day approval. Frontend shows entry_day badge and Re-submit button for approved entries.
